title: allium bigelovii
intro: Allium bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's onion, is a type of wild onion native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Allium bigelovii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Allium bigelovii can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various uses in natural medicine and wellness practices.
